Let me start by opening the balance sheet section.</think>

--- Round 2 ---
<think>I found the information I was looking for. In the consolidated balance sheet (合并资产负债表) of 江苏洋河酒厂股份有限公司 (Jiangsu Yanghe Distillery Co., Ltd.) for the period ending March 31, 2024, I can see:

使用权资产|74,341,718.39|82,464,551.16

This shows:
- 期末余额 (ending balance): 74,341,718.39 yuan
- 期初余额 (beginning balance): 82,464,551.16 yuan

The question asks for the right-of-use assets (使用权资产) of Yanghe Co., Ltd. The document clearly shows this value.

I have found the evidence needed to answer the question. I should now stop and provide the answer with the verbatim text from the document.</think>
<search>{"action":"stop","reason":"found the right-of-use assets value in the balance sheet"}</search>
<answer>["使用权资产|74,341,718.39|82,464,551.16"]</answer>
